name: aventer
description: Event layer for production AI agents — aventer.dev

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aventer/schema && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @aventer/schema && npm run build -w @aventer/delivery && npm run build -w @aventer/api
scripts.build:worker: npm run build -w @aventer/schema && npm run build -w @aventer/delivery && npm run build -w @aventer/worker
